name: Kahlua White Russion Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine Kahlua, vodka, and white chocolate in a saucepan. Heat over low heat or hot water until the chocolate melts and is well blended.
2. Sift flour with baking soda and baking powder together.
3. Grease two 9-inch layer cake pans well and lightly dust with flour.
4. Cream butter and shortening until light and fluffy, then beat in eggs one at a time.
5. Alternately blend in the Kahlua-chocolate mixture and the flour mixture with buttermilk.
6. Divide batter between the prepared pans.
7. Bake at 350°F for 25 to 30 minutes or until a tester inserted in the center comes out clean.
8. Cool in pans for 10 minutes, then transfer to wire racks to cool completely.
9. Spread half of the jam on the bottom surface of one cake layer and about 1/4 cup Kahlua White Russian Cream on top.
10. Place the second cake layer on top of the first layer.
11. Swirl the remaining cream topping on the sides and top of the cake.
12. Decorate generously with white chocolate curls and shavings.
13. Refrigerate, if prepared ahead, for at least 30 minutes before serving. Makes 12-16 servings.
Kahlua White Russian Cream:
1. Beat heavy whipping cream with sifted powdered sugar until thickened.
2. Gradually stir in Kahlua and vodka, beating until stiff.
